Hi there, it's

Rakibuzzaman Rahat

Currently building: |

From Dhaka, Bangladesh · Based in Aachen, Germany

ABOUT

Life Story

There's no short tl;dr here — the path from materials engineering to creative coding is too much fun to squeeze into a line or two.

I grew up in Bangladesh and got hooked on tech and gaming early. That curiosity led me to BUET, where I studied Materials and Metallurgical Engineering. There I realised I could build things without breaking them — well, mostly — by writing code. I started with small scripts and buggy experiments, then fell into how games work and ended up making a few of my own.

After my bachelor's I moved to Germany. I'm now doing a Master’s in Materials Science and Engineering at RWTH Aachen. On the side I build indie games with ZeezBit Studios, work on AI and automation in industry, and do creative coding and data viz whenever I get the chance. I like sitting at the intersection of materials and software: both are about understanding systems and making things that work.

When I'm not in front of a screen, I'm often looking up at the sky — I'm a stargazing noob, but I love it. And I still aspire to build products that reach a global audience and to bridge materials engineering and software in a way that's useful and real. If the chance comes, I'll keep making games too.

I aspire to create something real and useful that reaches a global user base, while bridging materials engineering and software.

Here’s to hoping it all works out.

JOURNEY

Experience

2025

Working Student | AI and Automation

Uniper

March 2025 — Present

Working on AI and automation initiatives at Uniper, a leading international energy company. Supporting the transition toward a low-carbon energy system.

2023

CRM System Lead

Unilever Bangladesh (Pureit)

June 2023 — April 2024

Unilever Pureit Bangaldesh, a part of Unilever Bangladeshs' Home Care brand, with a goal to ensure safe drinking water for everyone. With the motto of Consumer First, it's the market leader in it's segment.

2022

Game Developer & Coordinator

Dark Kak

August 2022 — January 2023

A game development initiative, focused on creating game-based simulation game to help youth educate in different aspects of life.

2020

Engineer | Metallurgical

Bashundhara Gold Refinery Limited (BGRL)

August 2020 — October 2021

Bashundhara Gold Refinery Limited (BGRL), a sister concern of Bashundhara Group. Bashundhara Group believes in serving the people and the country; not only in doing business and making profit. It had come into existence with that belief and adopted ‘For the People, For the Country’ as its core theme.

2019

Engineer | Quality Control

Rani Re-Rolling Mills Ltd (RRM)

November 2019 — December 2019

The Rani Re-Rolling Mills Ltd. (RRM) is imbued with a forward looking vision to acquire a global perspective and become a first rate business conglomerate. RRM has a track record in manufacturing of mild steel structural Re-bars and Wire products in Bangladesh for decades.

2017

Intern | Quality Control

Bandar Steel Industries LTD (BSI)

September 2017 — October 2017

Bandar Steel Industries Limited is one of the most sparkling limited company in the steel sector of Bangladesh. Our key product is MS billets and deformed MS bars which are mandatory for constructional purposes.

2019

Founder | Indie Game Dev

ZeezBit Studios.

May 2019 — Present

An Indie Game Development, focused on creating and producing high-quality originals. Specialised in making 2D games.
